features.name: always_comb with register assignments feeding back to expression at block start
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block where a combinational expression using values from registers is evaluated at the beginning of the block, but those registers are assigned later within the same always_comb

features.name: multi-branch always_comb with reg assignments in if-else branches
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block with if-else branches that assign to registers, where register values read after the block depend on branch ordering
